title: thilachium macrophyllum
intro: Thilachium macrophyllum, also known as Longspur Thilachium or Wild Tobacco, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory problems, reducing pain and swelling, and acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Thilachium macrophyllum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
